import { Tabs } from 'nextra/components'

# v1



NotificationService manages sending and receiving notifications.


---

<div style={{borderLeft: '3px solid #0070f3', paddingLeft: '1.5rem', marginTop: '2rem', marginBottom: '2rem'}}>

### <span style={{backgroundColor: '#0070f3', color: 'white', padding: '2px 10px', borderRadius: '4px', fontSize: '0.7rem', fontWeight: 700, fontFamily: 'monospace', verticalAlign: 'middle', marginRight: '0.5rem'}}>UNARY</span> Send

Send delivers a notification to a recipient.

<Tabs items={['Request: SendRequest', 'Response: SendResponse']}>
  <Tabs.Tab>

| Field | Type | | Description |
|-------|------|:---:|-------------|
| `recipient` | `Recipient` |  | recipient is who the notification should be delivered to. |
| `subject` | `string` |  | subject is the short title of the notification. |
| `body` | `string` |  | body is the full notification content. |
| `scheduled_at` | `Timestamp` | <span style={{fontSize:'0.7rem',background:'#9ca3af',color:'white',padding:'1px 6px',borderRadius:'3px'}}>optional</span> | scheduled_at optionally schedules delivery for a future time. |

</Tabs.Tab>
  <Tabs.Tab>

| Field | Type | | Description |
|-------|------|:---:|-------------|
| `notification_id` | `string` |  | notification_id is the unique identifier assigned to the notification. |
| `status` | `DeliveryStatus` |  | status is the initial delivery status. |
| `queued_at` | `Timestamp` |  | queued_at is the time the notification was accepted. |

</Tabs.Tab>
</Tabs>

</div>

---

<div style={{borderLeft: '3px solid #7928ca', paddingLeft: '1.5rem', marginTop: '2rem', marginBottom: '2rem'}}>

### <span style={{backgroundColor: '#7928ca', color: 'white', padding: '2px 10px', borderRadius: '4px', fontSize: '0.7rem', fontWeight: 700, fontFamily: 'monospace', verticalAlign: 'middle', marginRight: '0.5rem'}}>SERVER STREAM</span> Subscribe

Subscribe opens a live stream of incoming notifications for a user.

<Tabs items={['Request: SubscribeRequest', 'Response: Notification']}>
  <Tabs.Tab>

| Field | Type | | Description |
|-------|------|:---:|-------------|
| `user_id` | `string` |  | user_id identifies the user whose notifications to stream. |

</Tabs.Tab>
  <Tabs.Tab>

| Field | Type | | Description |
|-------|------|:---:|-------------|
| `notification_id` | `string` |  | notification_id is the unique identifier of the notification. |
| `subject` | `string` |  | subject is the short title of the notification. |
| `body` | `string` |  | body is the full notification content. |
| `status` | `DeliveryStatus` |  | status is the current delivery status. |
| `sent_at` | `Timestamp` |  | sent_at is when the notification was originally sent. |

</Tabs.Tab>
</Tabs>

</div>

---

<div style={{borderLeft: '3px solid #f5a623', paddingLeft: '1.5rem', marginTop: '2rem', marginBottom: '2rem'}}>

### <span style={{backgroundColor: '#f5a623', color: 'white', padding: '2px 10px', borderRadius: '4px', fontSize: '0.7rem', fontWeight: 700, fontFamily: 'monospace', verticalAlign: 'middle', marginRight: '0.5rem'}}>CLIENT STREAM</span> Acknowledge

Acknowledge bulk-acknowledges a stream of notification IDs.

<Tabs items={['Request: AcknowledgeRequest', 'Response: AcknowledgeResponse']}>
  <Tabs.Tab>

| Field | Type | | Description |
|-------|------|:---:|-------------|
| `notification_id` | `string` |  | notification_id is the ID of the notification to acknowledge. |

</Tabs.Tab>
  <Tabs.Tab>

| Field | Type | | Description |
|-------|------|:---:|-------------|
| `acknowledged_count` | `int32` |  | acknowledged_count is how many notifications were successfully acknowledged. |
| `failed_ids` | `string` | <span style={{fontSize:'0.7rem',background:'#6b7280',color:'white',padding:'1px 6px',borderRadius:'3px'}}>repeated</span> | failed_ids contains IDs that could not be acknowledged. |

</Tabs.Tab>
</Tabs>

</div>

---

<div style={{borderLeft: '3px solid #e00', paddingLeft: '1.5rem', marginTop: '2rem', marginBottom: '2rem'}}>

### <span style={{backgroundColor: '#e00', color: 'white', padding: '2px 10px', borderRadius: '4px', fontSize: '0.7rem', fontWeight: 700, fontFamily: 'monospace', verticalAlign: 'middle', marginRight: '0.5rem'}}>BIDI STREAM</span> Chat

Chat opens a bidirectional stream for real-time messaging.

<Tabs items={['Request: ChatMessage', 'Response: ChatMessage']}>
  <Tabs.Tab>

| Field | Type | | Description |
|-------|------|:---:|-------------|
| `sender_id` | `string` |  | sender_id is the user ID of the message author. |
| `text` | `string` |  | text is the content of the message. |
| `sent_at` | `Timestamp` |  | sent_at is when the message was sent. |

</Tabs.Tab>
  <Tabs.Tab>

| Field | Type | | Description |
|-------|------|:---:|-------------|
| `sender_id` | `string` |  | sender_id is the user ID of the message author. |
| `text` | `string` |  | text is the content of the message. |
| `sent_at` | `Timestamp` |  | sent_at is when the message was sent. |

</Tabs.Tab>
</Tabs>

</div>
